summary: Phase 3 Slice 1 is complete. Implemented a deterministic shared built-in pet skin catalog with 7 skins, each with stable id, label, and visual color metadata. Integrated into App.tsx for renderer display and main.ts for the character context menu. All 114 tests pass, TypeScript compiles cleanly, production build succeeds, and no forbidden features are present.
evidence: src/shared/petSkins.ts exports BUILT_IN_PET_SKINS with 7 deterministic skins
First 5 skin ids match original order: pixel-cat, pixel-dog, pixel-frog, pixel-panda, pixel-bot
Each skin has id, label, primaryColor, accentColor, textColor
src/shared/petSkins.test.ts has 3 tests covering stable ids, labels/color metadata, and index safety
src/App.tsx imports BUILT_IN_PET_SKINS and uses getPetSkinByIndex() for display
src/main.ts imports BUILT_IN_PET_SKINS for context menu character list
npm run build: renderer, main, and preload all build cleanly
manual_verification_required: Right-click pet menu shows more than the original five built-in skins
Selecting each added skin updates the visible pet label/color
No sound, hotkey, plugin, import/export, upload, notification, backend, or cloud behavior is present
next_maker_instruction: Phase 3 Slice 1 is accepted. Do not advance to another Phase 3 backlog item until the human manual gate is approved.
